title: Small-scale silencing experiment in vegetative Euplotes crassus (provisional)
steps: Grow RNAse III deficient E.coli strain HT115 in LB with antibiotic selection o/n at 37°C.
Prepare a 1:100 dilution of the bacterial culture, and grow it at 37°C until it reaches an OD 600 of 0.4.
Add 0.4 mM IPTG, and induce RNA transcription from the L4440 plasmid in the bacteria o/n at 37°C.
Collect the bacteria by centrifugation at max speed for 10 minutes, and wash them once with ddH 2 O.
Isolate at least 30 well-starved Euplotes crassus cells, and feed them twice a day with feeding bacteria.
Leave the Euplotes crassus cells at 24°C, and monitor daily the change in phenotype.
creator: Rachele Cesaroni
